context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures the Redis object cache for WooCommerce, including all required wp-config.php constants, proper TTL settings, and exclusion of volatile cache groups that would cause cache stampedes on checkout.

checklist.name: MAXTTL set to 86400
checklist.description: WP_REDIS_MAXTTL is defined and set to 86400 (24 hours)

checklist.name: Plugin install command
checklist.description: setup-notes.md includes 'wp plugin install redis-cache' (or equivalent WP-CLI command to install the Redis Object Cache plugin)

checklist.name: wp redis enable command
checklist.description: setup-notes.md includes 'wp redis enable' to activate the object cache drop-in

checklist.name: Volatile data exclusion rationale
checklist.description: setup-notes.md explains that session/cart data is excluded from Redis because it changes on every request (or equivalent: to prevent cache stampedes / stale session data on checkout)
